tips.title: Printable version of requirements
tips.details: If you need to print a version of the requirements to take to a swimming instructor, we have created this [Stage 1 document](https://cms.scouts.org.uk/media/n1tgvuic/swimmer-stage-1-pdf.pdf) you can use.

tips.title: Swim England
tips.details:
The Swim England equivalent for this stage is **Discovery Duckling 4.**

If you have achieved this award, you can gain your Stage 1 Activity Badge.

tips.title: Swim Wales
tips.details:
The Swim Wales equivalent for this stage is **Splash 6.**

If you have achieved this award, you can gain your Stage 1 Activity Badge.

tips.title: Swim Ulster
tips.details:
The Swim Ulster equivalent for this stage is **Level 2.**

If you have achieved this award, you can gain your Stage 1 Activity Badge.

tips.title: Scottish Swimming
tips.details:
The Scottish Swimming equivalent for this stage is **Swim Skills 1.**

If you have achieved this award, you can gain your Stage 1 Activity Badge.

tips.title: STA (Swimming Teachers Association)
tips.details:
The STA equivalent for this stage is **Octopus 1.**

If you have achieved this award, you can gain your Stage 1 Activity Badge.
